setting.note: Begins near Edinburgh, at the House of Shaws by Cramond, then crosses the Highlands after a real murder, the Appin killing of 1752. Stevenson tracked the route on maps and it can be walked.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. Robert Louis Stevenson published this in 1886.
